resumeText: Senior Product Manager with 9 years of experience in B2B SaaS, analytics, and AI-enabled workflows. Led cross-functional teams, launched enterprise features, improved activation by 24%, reduced churn by 11%.
Product analyst with 3 years of experience in marketplace analytics, retention analysis, experimentation, and KPI reporting. Built dashboards and supported growth experiments.
Director-level product leader with 12 years across healthtech and enterprise software. Managed PM teams, drove pricing programs, and partnered with sales on strategic accounts.
